productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Laptop Carry Black Bags
description: This bag from united colors of benetton is a perfect blend of functionality and style. With ample space and a lushly padded laptop chamber and many additional zippers, this bag will keep you well organized. Height: 31 cm Length: 43 cm Depth: 10 cm Made of 80% polyester and 20% polyurethane with a lining made of 100% polyester Generously padded laptop chamber fastened with velcro strap Three sub chambers to store other essentials Styled in sling style with adjustable straps for ease of carrying Care Do not wash, bleach, iron, dry clean or tumble dry Rub surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
